name: Wellness
description: Hyperion SMGs tighten their spread the longer you hold the trigger, rather than kicking wider. The accuracy stat shown reflects their fully stabilised performance. Wellness is a Hyperion SMG variant that always rolls with a fixed-element Maliwan barrel, giving stronger damage-over-time and a higher status chance than standard parts. A Maliwan grip can push these elemental bonuses further. Even at lower rarities, its reliable procs can carry you until you find a better drop.
notes: Related Hyperion SMGs with fixed-element Maliwan barrels include Backburner (incendiary), Cooler (cryo), Storm (shock), and Weisenheimer (corrosive). Wellness spawns at green rarity or above. It is a world drop from any appropriate loot source.
